johnzfitch/claude-cowork-linux.desc: Run Claude Desktop's Cowork mode natively on Linux by reverse-engineering macOS components for direct execution without a VM.

johnzfitch/dota.desc: Post-quantum secure secrets manager using hybrid ML-KEM-768 and X25519 encryption with a terminal UI for secure secret management.

johnzfitch/claude-wiki.desc: Comprehensive Markdown documentation mirror for Anthropic's Claude, featuring 2000+ articles on APIs, SDKs, agents, and integrations.

johnzfitch/pyghidra-lite.desc: Token-efficient MCP server for Ghidra, enabling analysis of ELF, Mach-O, and PE binaries with Swift, Objective-C, and Hermes support.

johnzfitch/filearchy.desc: Wayland file manager forked from cosmic-files, enhancing workflows with custom MIME icons, extended archive support, and terminal app integration.

johnzfitch/privacy-toggles.desc: Control outbound telemetry on macOS with a web dashboard and menu bar app, featuring 61 toggles and DNS sinkhole blocking.

johnzfitch/claude-warden.desc: Security hooks for Claude Code that optimize token usage, enforce budgets, and provide observability with OTEL tracing and SSRF protection.

johnzfitch/llmx.desc: Local-first codebase indexer utilizing BM25 and neural embeddings for efficient semantic search and chunk exports in-browser via WebGPU.

johnzfitch/iconics.desc: A semantic icon library leveraging SQLite for cataloging, offering intelligent search and markdown export for efficient project integration.

johnzfitch/arch-dependency-matrices.desc: Mathematical analysis of Arch Linux package dependencies using graph theory, spectral analysis, and linear algebra in Python.

johnzfitch/raley-bot.desc: Automated grocery shopping assistant leveraging web API for intelligent product selection, price tracking, and coupon clipping via CLI and MCP.
